etymology.description: semantic Ś§ē(Ś§ē) (xńę, "evening") + phonetic ÁĒė(ÁĒė) (gńĀn) -> sunset or dusk
etymology.interpretation: Ś§ē(Ś§ē) (xńę, "evening") depicts the concept of the evening, directly tying to the idea of sunset. ÁĒė(ÁĒė) (gńĀn) contributes the phonetic element, lending the sound. The combination evokes the imagery of the sky at evening, hence sunset or dusk.
